hero.heading: Building Better Boys, One Recipe at a Time
hero.subheading: Boys Who Cook is a nonprofit organization empowering young men through culinary education, community, and confidence.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: At Boys Who Cook, we believe that the kitchen is one of the most powerful classrooms. Through hands-on culinary experiences, we teach young men essential life skills, build their self-confidence, and foster a sense of community and responsibility. Cooking is more than preparing food — it's about empowerment, creativity, and connection.

programs_section.heading: What We Do
programs_section.subheading: From beginner cooking classes to community cookouts, our programs give boys the tools to succeed in the kitchen and in life.

cta_section.heading: Help Us Make a Difference
cta_section.text: Your support helps us provide cooking supplies, ingredients, and mentorship to young men in our community. Every dollar makes an impact.
